title: Interpreting a predictive failure alert for a node used by my job
query_text: I received an email that node042 has been flagged by the AIOps system with a P1 hardware alert (confidence 0.91). What were the contributing factors, and should I be concerned about data integrity in my job output?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: The P1 alert is driven primarily by 147 correctable ECC errors in 24h (SHAP 0.41) and 18.2% memory bandwidth degradation (SHAP 0.28). ECC correctable errors do not silently corrupt data but rapid escalation suggests a failing DIMM. Recommend verifying job output checksums and rerunning any job that used node042 for memory-intensive operations. The node has been drained.
